message:
test(vtparse,config): add 75 unit tests for VT transition tables and config types

vtparse transitions: verify DEC ANSI parser state machine entries for
Ground, Escape, CSI, OSC, DCS, APC, SOS/PM states and entry/exit actions.
config: expand frontend, serial, and exec_domain test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
